category_sources: source_facts.description says OpenList is a new AList fork; official OpenList README describes a web-based file management and file listing system.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openlist; official OpenList repository and documentation use the display name OpenList.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://doc.oplist.org/; official OpenList documentation repository identifies this as an official documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/OpenListTeam/OpenList, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official OpenList README lists multiple storage support, file preview, WebDAV, and web file operations; source_facts.description identifies it as an AList fork.
